data.id: TR-PICUS-DEFENSE-001: Print Spooler Privilege Escalation (PrintNightMare, CVE-2021-1675)
data.name: TR-PICUS-DEFENSE-001: Print Spooler Privilege Escalation (PrintNightMare, CVE-2021-1675)
data.description: Detects exploitation of Print Spooler service for privilege escalation. Monitors for spoolsv.exe loading unsigned DLLs, spawning child processes, or modification patterns consistent with PrintNightMare/CVE-2021-1675 exploitation. Critical privilege escalation vector. MITRE T1548.004.
data.contents: (process.name contains 'spoolsv.exe' OR process.parent.name contains 'spoolsv.exe') AND (process.apiCalls contains 'AddPrinterDriver' OR process.apiCalls contains 'GetPrinterDriver' OR process.command_line contains 'rundll32' OR process.modules contains 'localspl.dll' AND process.isSigned = false)

techniques.name: Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism: Elevated Execution with Prompt
Boot or Logon Autostart Execution: Print Processors
